summary: Backend-only regression pass for audit fixes (iteration 63). Ran 17 targeted tests covering /api/places/search fallback + invalid ZIP, sponsor photo upload magic-byte validation, /api/files serve, sponsorship-requests, subscription-status, admin auth gating, and PayPal webhook fail-closed. 16/17 passed. All 11 requested regression items PASS.

minor.issue: Non-JSON request body triggers unhandled json.JSONDecodeError -> HTTP 500 (should be 400). Forged-JSON body correctly returns 400 as required. Not in original test list but flagged for hardening. Fix: wrap `event = await request.json()` in try/except -> 400.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Guard `await request.json()` in paypal_webhook against JSONDecodeError to return 400 instead of 500 on malformed bodies.
critical_code_review_comments: places_search now correctly catches httpx.HTTPError/ValueError/KeyError and re-raises 400 for invalid ZIP — verified with ZIP 00000 returning 400 with 'Could not find that ZIP code'.
_google_reserve is now called before the geocode leg (line 73 of places.py) — cost accounting fix confirmed present in code.
sponsors_subscribe wraps PayPal calls in try/except that deletes the pending row on any failure — verified in code (lines 227-249).
upload_sponsor_photo: magic-byte sniff (_sniff_image) plus 300/day global cap present and working. Fake PNG bytes with image/png content-type correctly rejected with 400.
test_credentials: ADMIN_PASSWORD=GrimReaper!2026 (from env). Admin login succeeded and /api/admin/verify returned 200 with the token.
seed_data_creation: Uploaded one valid tiny PNG via /api/sponsors/upload-photo (persists in db.files as kind=sponsor_photo). Created one sponsorship_request with business_name='TEST_ForkFate Diner'. Both are safely prefixed/labelled for later cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iter63_audit.py. Run via: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_iter63_audit.py -o addopts='' -v`. Note pytest.ini uses xdist by default; override addopts to run serially. All audit fixes for iteration 63 verified. Only outstanding backend nit is JSONDecodeError -> 500 on /api/paypal/webhook with non-JSON body.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — audit-fix regression pass; all requested items passed. Only incidental finding: paypal_webhook does not guard `request.json()` against malformed bodies -> 500. Fix is a 3-line try/except around the json parse.
